items.title: Brock Bowers: Participating in OTAs
items.body_text: Bowers (knee) is participating in OTAs this week, Ryan McFadden of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Patrick Mahomes: Limited to 7-on-7 work at OTAs
items.body_text: Mahomes (knee) has been participating in OTAs this week in a limited capacity, Pete Sweeney of ArrowheadPride.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Xavier Worthy: Had offseason shoulder surgery
items.body_text: Worthy (shoulder) has been limited at OTAs this week after he underwent offseason surgery to repair a torn labrum in his left shoulder, Matt Foster of KSHB Kansas City reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Garrett Wilson: Participating in OTAs
items.body_text: Wilson (knee) is participating in OTAs this week, Ryan Dunleavy of the New York Post reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Luther Burden: Draws praise from head coach
items.body_text: Speaking with the media Thursday, coach Ben Johnson said he's "buying Burden stock right now" after a strong start to the Bears' offseason program, Kevin Fishbain of The Athletic reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
